CustomField.description: Shows if development allows rental asst from other sources. If "Yes", the "Rental Asst Permitted" field will be auto-checked on all properties in this development. If "No", it will be auto-unchecked. Default: Yes. Reset when new properties are created.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows if development allows rental asst from other sources. If "Yes", the "Rental Asst Permitted" field will be auto-checked on all properties in this development. If "No", it will be auto-unchecked. Default: Yes. Reset when new properties are created.
CustomField.label: Development Allows Rental Assistance?
